title: Stay connected and stay informed - Canada.ca
content:
## Stay connected and stay informed
Interacting with us on social media
Follow the CRA on Instagram @CanRevAgency .
Follow the CRA on Facebook .
Follow the CRA on Twitter @CanRevAgency .
Follow the CRA on LinkedIn .
Watch videos about taxes, benefits, charities, and more on the CRA YouTube channel.
Subscribe to a CRA podcast .
Subscribe to a CRA mailing list .
Add our RSS feeds to your feed reader.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
